G2 Luxe is situated in one of the best locations in Victoria Island, at the heart of Lagos’ business district and vibrant high-end nightlife.

Security: the building has on-site security 24/7 and a reputable hospital located next door for additional peace of mind.

Safety & Nearby Hospital
Reassurance

Your safety and comfort are priorities at G2 Luxe. The building has professional security on duty around the clock, and access to the apartment is controlled via the estate gate and smart lock.

  • Security personnel are on site 24/7 and monitor access to the property.
  • A reputable hospital is located next door for medical support if ever required.
  • A fire extinguisher is available in the kitchen cabinet for small emergencies.

How to use the fire extinguisher (PASS method):

  • P – Pull the safety pin.
  • A – Aim the nozzle at the base of the fire.
  • S – Squeeze the handle slowly.
  • S – Sweep from side to side.

For any safety concerns during your stay, please contact Queen immediately.
